violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on walk-in cooler. Door gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2024
The outdoor enclosure for refuse, recyclables, and returnables was observed to have accumulation of debris surrounding the dumpsters. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2024
The floor in the back storage area is in poor repair. Tiles were observed to be cracked or missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2024
Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2023
Walk-in Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2023
